title: These 7 Tiny Habits Will Transform Your Life
description: In this video, Sandeep shares the 7 tiny habits that helped him go from being homeless to leading companies worth over $60 billion. These simple, often overlooked practices quietly reshape mindset, focus, and success over time. From unexpected rituals to subtle mindset shifts, this is a behind-the-scenes look at the habits that quietly power the world's top performers.
